note_families.summary: McDonald's USA, LLC is a Delaware LLC franchising and operating McDonald's restaurants in the U.S. 13,557 total systemwide restaurants at Dec 31, 2024 (12,886 franchised + 671 company-owned). Wholly-owned subsidiary of McDonald's Corporation.
Consolidated statements include all subsidiaries. VIE evaluation performed — no consolidation required for franchisees, suppliers, or advertising cooperatives.
Estimates and assumptions required for financial statements. Actual results could differ.
ASU 2023-09 (income tax disclosures) effective for fiscal years after Dec 15, 2024. ASU 2024-03 (expense disaggregation) effective after Dec 15, 2026.

Company-owned sales recognized on cash basis net of sales tax. Royalties recognized when underlying sales occur. Rental income: minimum rent straight-line over franchise term, variable rent when sales occur. Initial fees recognized over franchise term (~20 years). Technology platform revenues: determined to be principal, presented gross. Brand licensing revenues based on % of sales.

Stated at cost, straight-line depreciation. Buildings up to 40 years, leasehold improvements lesser of useful life or lease term, equipment 3-12 years. McDonald's Corporation retains legal title to certain PP&E. Net PP&E: $13,080.4M (2024). Land $4,167.2M, Buildings on owned $12,096.1M, Buildings on leased $5,666.7M. Depreciation 2024: $869.7M. Net PP&E under franchise arrangements: $11.5B (incl land $3.9B).

Significant real estate portfolio (ground leases + improved leases). Terms generally 20 years with escalations and renewal options. Operating ROU: $4,821.4M, Finance ROU: $1,020.0M. Operating lease liability: $5,262.1M, Finance: $782.8M. Weighted average remaining term: 17 years (operating), 28 years (finance). Discount rate: 4.4% (operating), 4.1% (finance). Annual cash payments ~$0.6B. Future minimum lease payments: $9.0B total ($7.5B operating + $1.5B finance).
Stated at cost, straight-line 3-10 years. Customer-facing shorter, back office longer. Capitalized software net: $71.9M (2024), $91.7M (2023), $104.6M (2022). No indicators of impairment.

Reviewed annually in Q4 and when indicators exist. Assets grouped at field office level. Individual restaurant DCF analysis if indicator exists. Losses on held-for-disposal recognized when plan committed and disposal probable within 12 months.

Assigned to U.S. market reporting unit. Primarily from franchisee restaurant purchases. 2024 acquisitions: ~$10M net tangible, ~$110M identifiable intangible, ~$20M goodwill. If sold within 24 months, goodwill written off entirely. Qualitative assessment — no impairment indicators.

Company-owned advertising contributions: $94.9M (2024). Not primary beneficiary of cooperatives — no consolidation. Production costs expensed when aired: $84.6M (2024) in SG&A. Significant additional costs incurred by franchisees.

Included in McDonald's consolidated federal return. Separate-return basis recording. Current tax 2024: $1,033.3M (federal $853.9M + state $179.4M). Deferred tax provision: $11.6M. Effective rate: 23.2% (2024). Net deferred tax liability: $1,416.7M. Driven by PP&E ($1,356.0M) and lease ROU ($1,400.4M) offset by lease liability ($1,449.9M). Unrecognized tax benefits: $75.8M. Interest accrued: $25.7M. No longer subject to examination before 2009.

401(k) with employer match. Nine investment alternatives + McDonald's stock (limited to 20%). Unfunded nonqualified supplemental plans: $151.1M (2024), $162.6M (2023) liability. Derivative contracts hedge market-driven liability changes. Total U.S. benefit costs: $28.6M (2024).

2% royalty to parent: $1,069.4M (2024). Dividends to parent: $3,461.6M (2024). $2.4B intercompany payable arrangements (12-month swap rate + 1%). Interest on payables: $159.1M (2024). McDonald's $675M revolver from Company (no draws). Net intercompany payable: $910.6M. Allocated SG&A from parent at no charge.
February 17, 2025: $2.4B intercompany payable matured and converted to equity. No longer an obligation.
2024: $7.2M. Gains on restaurant sales ($46.7M), asset dispositions ($60.8M), other gains ($6.9M). Accelerating the Organization restructuring: $1.2M in 2024, cumulative $63.6M.
Subject to proceedings/lawsuits in ordinary course. Does not believe any current matter will have material adverse effect.
Revenues from franchised restaurants 2024: Rents $5,170.7M, Royalties $2,014.5M, Initial fees $25.4M = $7,210.6M total. Future minimum rent: $14,159.0M ($8,349.0M owned + $5,810.0M leased).
